tournament.name: Bharat Pro Circuit League Season 2
tournament.description: Welcome to BPC League Season 2, where bigger competition meets a more refined competitive experience. With the league expanding from 60 to 80 players, the same fast-paced GSL-style format returns—featuring BO1 group battles, playoffs, and last-chance pathways that ensure every team earns their place. This season introduces enhanced player showcases through BPC Player Cards and Community Profiles, giving every participant a persistent identity beyond the bracket. Registration, verification, and substitution systems have also been streamlined to make the journey from sign-up to game day smoother than ever. Whether you dominate from the start or fight your way back into contention, every match still matters. One draft, one comeback, one clutch call can change everything. Adapt, perform, and prove you belong among the best.
tournament.rulebook:
BLAST — 16 teams (short overview)

STRUCTURE
• Four(4) groups of 4, BO1 round robin (everyone in-group plays everyone once).
• Order: Groups → Last Chance → Play-In → Main playoffs (QF → SF → Final).

WHO ADVANCES FROM GROUPS (BY IN-GROUP FINISH)
• 1st in each group → Main Quarter Finals.
• 2nd in each group → Play-In: each plays one Last Chance finalist for a main quarterfinal slot.
• 3rd–4th in each group → Side path only: start Last Chance (eight entrants total)


LAST CHANCE (8 TEAMS)
Group A #3 & #4, Group B #3 & #4, Group C #3 & #4 and Group D #3 & #4 contest a single-elimination Last Chance until four finalists advance. Those two each meet a Play-In matchup (paired against that group’s #2, not against each other in this round).
Last chance Matches will be seeded such that opposite group teams play each other [A#4 vs C#3...]

PLAY-IN — #2 vs LAST CHANCE FINALIST (4 QUALIFIERS)
Group A #2 vs one Last Chance finalist · Group B #2 vs the other Last Chance finalist and so on for Group C#2 and Group D#2 — four winners qualify to main quarterfinals.

MAIN PLAYOFFS
• Quarterfinals: Play-ins winners vs Group#1.
• Semifinals: (QF1 winner vs QF2 winner) and (QF3 winner vs QF4 winner)
• Final: Semi winners.

announcements.body:
Registrations for BPC League Season 2 are open now.

Slots are limited to 80 and filling up fast. Grab your seat now!
